subparts.text: Name the chronology of Sultanates in Delhi.
Name the chronology of emperors during the Mughal period in India.
Name 2 regions which were under the influence of Islamic provincial architecture in India.
Name 2 architectural projects of reckoning undertaken under Akbar.
Explain the architectural evolution of Quwait-ul-Islam mosque under Qutbuddin Aibak and Iltutmish and Alauddin Khalji.
Explain the architecture of any one mosque of your choice of provincial architecture category.
Explain the architecture of Alai Darwaza in Quwait-ul-Islam mosque complex and its contribution to the then future of Islamic architecture in India.
Name 2 religious and 3 civic typology of buildings under Islamic rulers in India.
Explain the architecture of any one architectural project under the Tughlaqs during the Sultanate period.
Explain the architecture of Ghiasuddin Tughlaq’s tomb.
